title: Record an Ultrawork recovery resume token contract
prompt: Create reports/recovery-resume-token-contract.md with sections for Checkpoint resume, Skip interview, Evidence proof, and Tool schema budget.

fixtureActions.content:
# Recovery Resume Token Contract

## Checkpoint resume
Resume from last durable checkpoint; do not restart from scratch unless unusable

## Skip interview
Skip UltraPlan interview when phase already advanced; continue design/implementation/verification

## Evidence proof
Prefer tests/typecheck/real-surface proof; mark AC/nodes done only with evidence

## Tool schema budget
Keep Grep/Glob/Bash/web contracts while compressing always-on tool copy
